hooks.command: $j=[Console]::In.ReadToEnd()|ConvertFrom-Json;$c=[string]$j.tool_input.command;if($c -match 'git\s+commit'){$b=(git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD 2>$null);if($b -eq 'main' -or $b -eq 'master'){@{hookSpecificOutput=@{hookEventName='PreToolUse';permissionDecision='deny';permissionDecisionReason=("Blocked: direct commit to '"+$b+"'. Create a feature branch first: git checkout -b <name>, then commit.")}}|ConvertTo-Json -Compress -Depth 5}}
hooks.statusMessage: Branch guard: checking not on main
